txnLog.merchantIdFilter: select distinct code from merchant where deleted = '0' and locked = '0'order by code

binTable.BinFilter: select id `key`, bin `value` from bin_table where bin_master_id = :binMasterId

lookupValue.lookupValueFilter: select id `key`, `value` `value` from lookup_value where lookup_type = (select id from lookup_type where name = :lookupTypeName)
